title: oxalis bipartita subsp. bipartita
intro: Oxalis bipartita subsp. bipartita, also known as the purple wood sorrel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of oxalic acid, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Oxalis bipartita subsp. bipartita include its potential to act as an antimicrobial agent, reduce inflammation, and support kidney function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas and infusions, which can be used to treat digestive issues and as a natural diuretic.
